languages.text: {n}Происхождение оружия не оставляет сомнений: изображенный кистью неведомого художника меч выкован не человеческими руками. Плавные изгибы, необыкновенный блеск лезвия, драгоценный камень возле гарды выдают в оружии творение эльдарского мастера.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Оружие выгядит скорее боевым, чем парадным. Хозяин вряд ли стеснялся пускать эту вещь в ход.{/n}
[драфт]{n}Оружие выгядит странным и незнакомым. Возможно, ваш предок питал слабость к экзотике?{/n}

languages.text: {n}There can be no doubt about the weapon's origins: the sword depicted by this unknown artist's brush was not forged by human hands. The fluid curves, the exceptional lustre of the blade, and the gem at the hilt show the weapon to be the work of an Aeldari artisan.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Происхождение оружия не оставляет сомнений: изображенный кистью неведомого художника меч выкован не человеческими руками. Плавные изгибы, необыкновенный блеск лезвия, драгоценный камень возле гарды выдают в оружии творение эльдарского мастера.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}There can be no doubt about the weapon's origins: the sword depicted by this unknown artist's brush was not forged by human hands. The fluid curves, the exceptional lustre of the blade, and the gem at the hilt show the weapon to be the work of an Aeldari artisan.{/n}

{n}There can be no doubt about the weapon's origins: the sword depicted by this unknown artist's brush was not forged by human hands. The fluid curves, the exceptional lustre of the blade, and the gem at the hilt show the weapon to be the work of an Aeldari artisan.{/n}

{n}There can be no doubt about the weapon's origins: the sword depicted by this unknown artist's brush was not forged by human hands. The fluid curves, the exceptional lustre of the blade, and the gem at the hilt show the weapon to be the work of an Aeldari artisan.{/n}

languages.text: {n}No cabe duda del origen del arma. La espada que el artista desconocido ilustra no es obra de manos humanas. Sus curvas fluidas, el excepcional brillo de la hoja y la gema de la empuñadura muestran la creación de un artesano Aeldari.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There can be no doubt about the weapon's origins: the sword depicted by this unknown artist's brush was not forged by human hands. The fluid curves, the exceptional lustre of the blade, and the gem at the hilt show the weapon to be the work of an Aeldari artisan.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}No cabe duda del origen del arma. La espada que el artista desconocido ilustra no es obra de manos humanas. Sus curvas fluidas, el excepcional brillo de la hoja y la gema de la empuñadura muestran la creación de un artesano Aeldari.{/n}

languages.text: {n}这把武器的来历毋庸置疑：无名画师笔下所绘的利剑绝非人类锻造。流畅优雅的曲线、剑刃非凡的光泽和剑柄上的宝石，都表明这武器出自艾达灵族工匠之手。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There can be no doubt about the weapon's origins: the sword depicted by this unknown artist's brush was not forged by human hands. The fluid curves, the exceptional lustre of the blade, and the gem at the hilt show the weapon to be the work of an Aeldari artisan.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}这把武器的来历毋庸置疑：无名画师笔下所绘的利剑绝非人类锻造。流畅优雅的曲线、剑刃非凡的光泽和剑柄上的宝石，都表明这武器出自艾达灵族工匠之手。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les origines de l'arme ne font aucun doute : l'épée dépeinte par cet artiste inconnu n'a pas été forgée par des mains humaines. Les courbes fluides, le lustre exceptionnel de la lame et les gemmes sur la garde indiquent que l'arme est le fruit de l'artisanat aeldari.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There can be no doubt about the weapon's origins: the sword depicted by this unknown artist's brush was not forged by human hands. The fluid curves, the exceptional lustre of the blade, and the gem at the hilt show the weapon to be the work of an Aeldari artisan.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les origines de l'arme ne font aucun doute : l'épée dépeinte par cet artiste inconnu n'a pas été forgée par des mains humaines. Les courbes fluides, le lustre exceptionnel de la lame et les gemmes sur la garde indiquent que l'arme est le fruit de l'artisanat aeldari.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Platalea ajaja Bu bilinmeyen sanatçının fırçasıyla tasvir edilen kılıç, insan elleriyle dövülmemiş. Akıcı kıvrımları, bıçağın olağanüstü parlaklığı ve kabzadaki mücevher; silahın bir Aeldari zanaatkârının eseri olduğunu gösteriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There can be no doubt about the weapon's origins: the sword depicted by this unknown artist's brush was not forged by human hands. The fluid curves, the exceptional lustre of the blade, and the gem at the hilt show the weapon to be the work of an Aeldari artisan.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Platalea ajaja Bu bilinmeyen sanatçının fırçasıyla tasvir edilen kılıç, insan elleriyle dövülmemiş. Akıcı kıvrımları, bıçağın olağanüstü parlaklığı ve kabzadaki mücevher; silahın bir Aeldari zanaatkârının eseri olduğunu gösteriyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Über die Herkunft der Waffe besteht kein Zweifel. Das vom Pinsel dieses unbekannten Künstlers gemalte Schwert wurde nicht von Menschenhand geschaffen. Die sanften Kurven, der außergewöhnliche Glanz und der Edelstein am Griff weisen die Waffe als Werk eines Aeldari-Künstlers aus.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There can be no doubt about the weapon's origins: the sword depicted by this unknown artist's brush was not forged by human hands. The fluid curves, the exceptional lustre of the blade, and the gem at the hilt show the weapon to be the work of an Aeldari artisan.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Über die Herkunft der Waffe besteht kein Zweifel. Das vom Pinsel dieses unbekannten Künstlers gemalte Schwert wurde nicht von Menschenhand geschaffen. Die sanften Kurven, der außergewöhnliche Glanz und der Edelstein am Griff weisen die Waffe als Werk eines Aeldari-Künstlers aus.{/n}

languages.text: {n}この武器は奇妙で見慣れない。もしかしたら、このユニークなアイテムは個人的な依頼だったのだろうか？{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The weapon looks strange and unfamiliar. Perhaps this unique item was a private commission?{/n}
